title: Life in prison bigger punishment: Madras HC commutes death sentence of man who raped daughter
description: The Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court recently commuted the death penalty of a man convicted for sexually assaulting his minor daughter [State of Tamil Nadu Vs Murugan].A division bench of Justice N Anand Venkatesh and Justice K K Ramakrishnan instead sentenced the man to imprisonment for life."Life imprisonment until death is a more enduring retributive measure than the finality of the gallows," the Court said.In an order passed on April 7, the Court held that keeping the convict alive to
